A VHS rip of the original Adult Swim lineup with commercials from the time. Shows aired include Mobile Suit Gundam, MS Gundam 0080 War in the Pocket and Outlaw Star.

Reruns of Digimon on ABC Family are also included in this video

the-mind-of-gay-gangsta-comedy-against-h.show: The Mind Of Gay Gangsta: Comedy Against Humanity (Full Collection)
the-mind-of-gay-gangsta-comedy-against-h.desc:
From nothing to something; comedian Troy Lad (age 19 as of this writing) creates a legacy for himself, with his comedy masterpiece. Originally a movie, he took to a broken up format to make it easily accessible and digestible, containing 60+ hours of content. Over the course of a 3 and a half year period, Troy grew fascinated by the art of comedy and made himself a promise: he would become the greatest of all time.

EVERYTHING SAID AND DONE IN THESE VIDEOS ARE FOR ENTERTAINMENT PURPOSES ONLY!!!

super-demetrios-2011-wtgff_xvs3c_file1.desc:
From the website, translated using Argos Translate:
He's a good boy, he's strong! It is Super Dimitrios, the latest feature film by the independent film group OTINai Productions. The film takes place in Thessaloniki and the case combines the various cultural features of the city, along with some of modern political history. All the above, combined with the megalomaniac clichés necessary for a superhero film, are intended to create an original surreal comedy.
This is a zero-budget DIY production that premiered in November 2011 at the 52nd Thessaloniki Film Festival and won the Public Best Greek Film Award along with the honorary Michael Cacoyannis Award. Immediately after, Super Dimitrios aired in 20 cities of the province, from Komotini to Chania, and about 1500 people saw the film for free, thanks to the Festival's Regional Promotions program. It was released in the Greek halls in Thessaloniki and Athens, regardless of 19/04/2012 to 02/05/2012, while it is the first Greek film to be shown with subtitles for people with hearing problems in its regular distribution. It is now available freely online.
Thank you so much for your concern!
OTINai Productions

This version is downloaded from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wtgFf_xVs3c

The movie was released on the OTiNaNAi Productions Vimeo channel under a CC BY-NC-ND-3.0 license. This is also the video the website used as embed.

While it was apparently originally shown with subtitles, I didn't find any, so this upload doesn't contain subtitles.

nostalgiaetherealcollection_file43.episode: 2001 Summer USA Network Premiere Of The Seige.mp4
nostalgiaetherealcollection_file43.desc:
Welcome to nostalgia central. NostalgiaEthereal's aka The Retro Connoisseur's wide collection of nostalgic content all in one place for everyone caring to go back in time for hours upon hours. VHS recordings ranging from the 90's to 00's, long marathons of obscure television, vintage cartoons and anime, retro drive-in movie projects, TV-movie broadcast recreations, original commercials throughout, Adult Swim-related content, and September 11th-related content. This is a time-machine in the form of a database. As time progresses, more will be added as I acquire more VHS tapes to transfer. So be on the lookout as time moves on for new content uploaded. Archiving these things is HIGHLY important and crucial to preservation of a time period that has long past and must be kept alive through data-hoarding archived media catalogues such as this.
I do not own any of the content shared here. Only for historical preservation and entertainment purposes.
nostalgiaetherealcollection_file43.u: https://archive.org/download/nostalgiaetherealcollection/2001 Summer USA Network Premiere Of The Seige.mp4

august-11-2013-c_file1.desc:
Another person on this website uploaded this Toonami broadcast/block but for whatever reason they plastered a huge watermark for their patreon over the entire thing. This deeply annoyed me and many others who were looking to relive those days or simply enjoy an older adult swim broadcast. I took it upon myself to find all the shows, commercials, bumpers etc from that night and compile them. Here I have uploaded this toonami block as it was in the original uploaders broadcast with much higher quality and without the ridiculous watermark. As you can imagine this took me a very long time to do but as someone who loves adult swim very much I decided it was worth doing.

As you can imagine I was not able to find every single thing. I am missing a handful of commercials that I was not able to source, and an episode from a Toonami/Adult Swim original anime. That being said I found suitable replacements for most of these commercials and the aforementioned episode. Constructive criticism is welcome, I try my best to make these remakes as real as possible.

Here is the schedule:
12:00 Bleach: Episode 310*

12:30 Naruto: Surviving the Cut! The Rookie Nine Together Again!*

1:00 One Piece: Epic, Heated Combat! the Fateful Final Conclusion!*

1:30 Soul Eater: The Death Scythes Convene - Stop Dad's Staff Reassignment?*

2:00 Sword Art Online: The Red Nosed Reindeer*

2:30 IGPX: Vulnerable Mind*

3:00 Eureka Seven: Wish Upon a Star

3:30 The Big O II: Day of the Advent

4:00 Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood: Daydream

4:30 Cowboy Bebop: Black Dog Serenade

5:00 Inuyasha: Jaken's Plan to Steal Tetsusaiga

5:30 Inuyasha: Sesshomaru and the Abducted Rin

Here is all the content I could not find:
English Credits for Bleach Episode Opening
Jobs (2013) Friday TV Spot 15 seconds
The White Queen Cox Promo
Cox Movies On Demand G.I. Joe
NTSF:SD:SUV/Children's Hospital Promo
30 Second version of gamefly "be amazing" prom (substituted with 15 second version)
Pizza Hut $10 Any carryout deal
America's Navy Sponsor Credit
Cox High Speed Internet
On Cinema adultswim.com promo
Wendy's "Saving a few bucks" (substituted with wendy's buck buck)
Breaking Bad The Final Episodes
Bob's Burgers "Now on Adult Swim" Promo (substituted with Bob's Burgers Louise promo)
Gatorade "Lightning Bolt" 30 second ad (substituted with 1 minute version)
Original Toonami Ending for Soul Eater (Made an edit myself to best match the toonami version)
TGI Friday's Pick 2 for $10 Original Ad (Replaced with very similar ad from the same time)
Eastbay.com Field Test commercial 30 second version (only found 1 minute version and chose not to add it)
TAX10000 original 30 second commercial not found, replaced with 15 second version
Quickinsurance123 'Healthcare Breakthrough' commercial 30 second version not found, replaced with 60 second version
Could not find exact version of Dove's 'Men Plus Care' Face Lotion commercial, replaced with similar version
Could not find exact version of Flips Headphones commercial, replaced with similar version
Wendy's 99 Cent Right Size Right Price, Replaced with 'Buck Buck' Wendy's commercial
Cox Verizon Wireless 'Watch Anywhere'
Kick-Ass 2 TV Spot 'Real Heroes' not found, replaced with similar version
ZQuiet Commercial
Relion Group Pradaxa Warning TV Spot 30 Second version not found, replaced with 60 second version
